drafts.Cover Letter:
Hi Anthropic team,

I'm Deepak Mallampati — Applied AI engineer building RAG, agentic workflows, and predictive ML for healthcare and enterprise. Recent example: Healthcare RAG system — ~30-35% contextual retrieval precision improvement.

Why Research Engineer, AI Observability: the work centers on shipping LLM/agentic systems with measurable impact, which is the loop I run today at Progress Solutions (RAG precision +30-35%, hallucinations reduced >30%). I'd love to do that with you.

Resume attached. Happy to dig into specifics on a call.

Thanks,
Deepak
drafts.Why do you want to join us?: Anthropic is shipping the kind of applied AI work I want to do for the next several years — production LLM/RAG systems with real measurement discipline. My current work at Progress Solutions sits on the same problem shape (clinical RAG, agentic workflows, predictive ML), and I want to take that into a higher-leverage product surface alongside an experienced team.
